2603.23966.title: Policy-Guided Threat Hunting: An LLM enabled Framework with Splunk SOC Triage
2603.23966.paper_summary: With frequently evolving Advanced Persistent Threats (APTs) in cyberspace, traditional security solutions approaches have become inadequate for threat hunting for organizations. Moreover, SOC (Security Operation Centers) analysts are often overwhelmed and struggle to analyze the huge volume of logs received from diverse devices in organizations. To address these challenges, we propose an automated and dynamic threat hunting framework for monitoring evolving threats, adapting to changing network conditions, and performing risk-based prioritization for the mitigation of suspicious and malicious traffic. By integrating Agentic AI with Splunk, an established SIEM platform, we developed a unique threat hunting framework. The framework systematically and seamlessly integrates different threat hunting modules together, ranging from traffic ingestion to anomaly assessment using a reconstruction-based autoencoder, deep reinforcement learning (DRL) with two layers for initial triage, and a large language model (LLM) for contextual analysis. We evaluated the framework against a publicly available benchmark dataset, as well as against a simulated dataset. The experimental results show that the framework can effectively adapt to different SOC objectives autonomously and identify suspicious and malicious traffic. The framework enhances operational effectiveness by supporting SOC analysts in their decision-making to block, allow, or monitor network traffic. This study thus enhances cybersecurity and threat hunting literature by presenting the novel threat hunting framework for security decision- making, as well as promoting cumulative research efforts to develop more effective frameworks to battle continuously evolving cyber threats.
2603.23966.paper_summary_zh: 隨著網絡空間中高級持續威脅（APTs）的不斷演變，傳統的安全解決方案已無法滿足組織的威脅狩獵需求。<lb/>此外，安全運營中心（SOC）分析師經常感到不堪重負，難以分析來自組織中各種設備的海量日誌。<lb/>為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了一個自動化和動態的威脅狩獵框架，用於監控不斷演變的威脅，適應變化的網絡條件，並進行基於風險的優先排序，以減輕可疑和惡意流量。<lb/>通過將Agentic AI與已建立的SIEM平台Splunk整合，我們開發了一個獨特的威脅狩獵框架。<lb/>該框架系統性且無縫地將不同的威脅狩獵模塊整合在一起，範圍從流量攝取到使用基於重建的自編碼器進行異常評估，並使用具有兩層的深度強化學習（DRL）進行初步篩查，以及使用大型語言模型（LLM）進行上下文分析。<lb/>我們對該框架進行了公開可用基準數據集的評估，以及對模擬數據集的評估。<lb/>實驗結果顯示，該框架能夠有效地自動適應不同的SOC目標並識別可疑和惡意流量。<lb/>該框架通過支持SOC分析師在阻止、允許或監控網絡流量的決策中提高了運營效率。<lb/>因此，本研究通過提出一個新穎的安全決策威脅狩獵框架，增強了網絡安全和威脅狩獵文獻，並促進了累積研究努力，以開發更有效的框架來對抗不斷演變的網絡威脅。
2603.23966.author: Rishikesh Sahay et.al.
2603.23966.authors: Rishikesh Sahay, Bell Eapen, Weizhi Meng, Md Rasel Al Mamun, Nikhil Kumar Dora, Manjusha Sumasadan, Sumit Kumar Tetarave, Rod Soto
